item_data.name: Mados Hot Sauce
item_data.description:
Scotch bonnet sauce for pouring, dipping and more!

Mado’s is packed with the beautiful burn of Scotch bonnets, plus papaya and coconut milk for a tropical taste with a surprising touch of sweetness. Plus it’s the perfect thickness to pour like a dream, but still stick to your wings, chops, veg, and anything else you put it on. Taste the Toronto legend today; your search for the perfect go-to pepper sauce is over.

item_data.name: Matcha
item_data.description:
Ceremonial Grade Matcha Green Tea Powder from Genuine Tea is distinguished by our commitment to transparency and freshness amongst others in the tea industry. To us, there was nothing more "genuine" than naming our Matcha powder after the family who cultivates, harvests and processes the Matcha we love -- Kato Matcha. 
Can you taste the music? The Katō Family has been producing premium quality Matcha in Uji, Japan for generations.
The secret? Playing Mozart to the tea leaves before harvest.
This is happy Matcha. This is Katō Matcha.

item_data.name: Zing - Pay Chen's Sacha-Ish Chili Miso Condiment
item_data.description:
Food Network called this a top foodie gift for the holidays! Perfect for every day use, for foodie gifts, or host or party favors! 

Sacha-ish Chili Miso Condiment is developed in collaboration with Pay Chen, a familiar face and voice on TV and radio stations across Canada. Pay is Taiwanese-Canadian, and Sacha-ish is inspired in part by her some of her favourite food memories of hot pot where dipping sauces like shāchá jiàng were always a feature at the dinner table. 

Expect earthy, salty-sweet, umami packed flavours that will add some depth with a little tangy, spicy twist to whatever you're making! 

Try it in: stir fries, as a dumpling sauce, mixed into noodles, as a marinade for chicken and meats, and even as a vegan nduja!

Ingredients: Cold pressed virgin sunflower oil, Miso (Soybeans, Rice), Vinegar, Dried chili peppers, Dessicated coconut, Sugars (cane sugar), Sesame paste, Dried seaweed, Spices, Black beans, Sea salt, Garlic powder, Ginger powder, Chickpea flour. Contains: Soy, Sesame

item_data.name: Zing - Christine Flynn's Buzz Hot Honey Condiment
item_data.description:
Perfect for every day use, for foodie gifts, or host or party favors!

Buzz Hot Honey was developed in collaboration with Chef Christine Flynn, bestselling cookbook author and executive chef at iQ Food Co.

Buzz is bright, floral, and spicy, and is so much more than just a chili-infused honey! We infuse the highest grade (i.e. Canada No. 1) of wildflower honey sourced directly from farmers in Ontario's wine country of Niagara with a blend of chilies, spices and herbs like lime leaf and lemongrass. We also added a dash of vinegar to punctuate the sweetness and make Buzz the versatile pantry hero we all love!

Spice/heat tolerance is subjective but we classify Buzz as medium spicy — expect a sweet heat!

Try it with: stir-fried veggies, as a condiment or dip (or dunk!), on a cheese board, in a cocktail, on pancakes, or dolloped onto hot buttered cornbread

Ingredients: Canada No. 1 Golden Liquid Honey, Vinegar, Dried chili peppers, Salt, Spices, Lime leaf, Lemongrass

item_data.name: Zing - Vincent Ng's Mala Chili Salt (Sichuan + Indian Inspired)
item_data.description:
Mala is a collaboration with Vincent Ng, chef and co-owner of Toronto's Food & Liquor, which is known for its playful, modern approach to traditional Chinese cuisine.  

Mala Chili Seasoning Salt is an ode to Sichuan flavours and the word translates as numbing (má) and spicy (là). Our pantry shortcut seasoning builds on these flavours with a nutty & aromatic twist from warm spices and toasted lentils popular in South India. This is our founders' most-used seasoning salt for a reason — it's addictive and incredibly versatile. 

Spice tolerance is subjective but we classify Mala as spicy!  Perfect for every day use, for foodie gifts, or host or party favors! 
Try it with: Rice, steamed veggies, popcorn, fries, grilled meats, for a twist on tomato-based (pasta or pizza) sauce, and to rim your cocktails! 

Ingredients: Dried chilli peppers, Sea salt, Spices, Lentils, Garlic powder, Dried mushrooms, Sesame seeds, Sugars (cane sugar), Naturally sourced citric acid | Contains: Sesame
